Templated nutrition. Okay, so there's two different kinds of nutrition that we are going to be giving to our challengers. One could be a templated nutrition, which is already pre-done. And they're really awesome plans that you can just hand see your challengers and they can just execute, right? And they are customizable based on weight. And then we have fully customizable nutrition plans, which we're going to be covering in the next video. But for this video, let's dive into the templated nutrition and where we can find them. So the 42 day detox uses templated nutrition pre-built meals that your challengers can choose from that all fit within a certain calorie and macro range that we've pre-determined. And they don't have to worry about any of that stuff. They just eat the meals that they pick. The six week challenge has pre-built ingredient list. So along with the recipe book, so they can make whatever recipes they want to make just using only the ingredients that's on the list. And then we have some internal plays that are, they have pre-built meal plans or ingredient list based on the specific play itself. So let's take a look at them and we can just dive right into the playbook, which is where you're going to find everything. In the playbook, they go through a lot of detail. We are just doing an overview on templated nutrition and I'll just show you a few different things and what it kind of looks like. So the 42 day detox is the first one we'll take a look at. So you'll click on that and you can take a look at the meal plans. So this, these meal plans will be in your members portal, but let's go right into them. So as an example, you can click on the one X and we'll get an idea of how that looks. So this would be templated nutrition for the 42 day detox. So as you can see, they'll have a week A meal plan and it will have breakfast, lunch, dinner. They choose one of the two, right? And then it has the grocery list of if they, depending on which meal they chose, what they need to pick up at the store, right? Super easy, super simple. And then it just goes into detail on how to prepare that, right? So if you picked, you know, the sweet berry rice with grilled chicken, it will tell you exactly how to prepare it and how to shop for it. So then it just goes into lunch and dinner and then it will go right into week B, right? And this goes all the way, same template. It shows the grocery list. So it shows the six options and then it shows the grocery list for those and then it shows exactly how to prepare the different options and then what they choose. So this is templated for the 42 day detox, extremely done for you. You would just give this link to your members, your challengers and they would execute based on this. Most likely they'll be inside of your members portal that you created, which we go into once you get into the playbook. We covered it a little bit earlier, but in the fulfillment section, but when you go into the playbook, it shows you exactly how to customize the entire portal. And then once your challengers are in there, you don't need to send them a link for this nutrition. They can just click on the button and then they have all of this, but they also have videos of you explaining it to them as well, which is really cool. And they'll have live videos on exactly how to cook it, which is why you want to get that members portal set up because it makes this templated nutrition really awesome. So let's go into the next one. We'll go into the templated nutrition for the six week challenge. Alright, so we'll head back and let's take a look at the six week challenge. So we can go over the meal plans and the workouts. Oops, must be back on the other one. Bear with me. Alright, so here we explain the nutrition and this meal plan basically has the ingredient list. So you can see proteins, fats, carbs and veggies. Now Alex will go into a lot more detail, but essentially they can pick anything that is on this list. And they can create a meal with it. And there's recipe books that go along with it. All of the big details are going to be in the playbook and exactly which meals they can have and all of that. But it's very, very simple. There's about 15 items for protein, about 10 items for fat, about 10 items for carbs and about 10 items for vegetables and they can make whatever they want as long as they stick to the portion sizes. And all of the portion sizes are listed right on here. So there's going to be four different versions, 1.25 through 2.75 depending on their weight. And this is just templated nutrition that you give them for all of the details and information you'll watch this video and you'll look in the nutrition plan as well. So that pretty much covers the main templated nutrition and you will find, let's head back in some of the other internal plays like the 28 day summer slim down will have like a different version of a meal that you just hand to your clients and they just execute it. But for the most part, these are very, very simple to do. And they're fully self explanatory and we've made them so no matter what level of nutrition your challengers have, they'll understand it and they'll be able to execute it. So that is the templated stuff. They're found within these plays here and then all the details are going to be covered right in the playbook. So now we can jump into the customized nutrition.
